stem: During feature review, when can project documents and performance testing results be uploaded for the WELL Portfolio?

options.text: Once all documents have been coordinated.
At the end of the first six months.

explanation: feature review 期間，WELL Portfolio 的 project documents 與 performance testing results 可在任何時間（at any time）上傳。

A.gap: 誤加上協調完成的前提
A.followup: 標準是否要求所有文件協調完成後才能上傳？

B.followup: 上傳是否被限制在前六個月結束時？

C.gap: 誤把占用率當上傳條件
C.followup: 50% occupancy 是否為文件上傳的前提？
